name: Hootsuite
tagline: Social media management platform for teams
description: Hootsuite is one of the oldest and most widely used social media management platforms. It lets teams schedule posts, monitor conversations, manage multiple accounts, and measure performance across all major social networks from one dashboard.
use_cases: Your marketing team manages 10+ social accounts across multiple networks and needs all scheduling, monitoring, and reporting in one dashboard
You need team-based approval workflows where one person drafts posts and a manager approves before publishing
Your brand needs social listening to monitor mentions, competitor activity, and industry keywords across platforms in real time
You run paid social alongside organic and want ad management for Facebook and Instagram integrated into the same tool as your organic scheduling
